rationale: Expand grammar to cover nested extra_context, URL/VCS sources, raw prompt values, partial replay dicts, and string booleans.

updates.replacement:
extra_context_object
    : '{' '}'
    | '{' extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)* '}'
    ;

extra_context_pair
    : STRING ':' json_value
    ;

json_value
    : STRING
    | json_bool
    | json_object
    | json_array
    ;

json_object
    : '{' '}'
    | '{' extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)* '}'
    ;

json_array
    : '[' ']'
    | '[' STRING (',' STRING)* ']'
    ;

prompts_object
    : '{}'
    | '{' prompt_pair (',' prompt_pair)* '}'
    ;

prompt_pair
    : STRING ':' STRING
    ;
